ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, middle, high) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the principal */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* School website */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of the latest enrollment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "per_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian students */,
  "per_black" REAL /* Percentage of Black students */,
  "per_hisp" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic students */,
  "per_min-te" REAL /* Percentage of students of other ethnicities */,
  "per_white" REAL /* Percentage of White students */,
  "per_native" REAL /* Percentage of Native American students */,
  "per_multiracial" REAL /* Percentage of Multiracial students */,
  "per_international" REAL /* Percentage of International students */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students for demographic data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "mathtot" INTEGER /* Average math score */,
  "avg_yr_exp" REAL /* Average years of teaching experience */,
  "avg_sal" REAL /* Average salary */,
  "per_spent" REAL /* Percentage of budget spent on teacher salary */,
  "readingtot" INTEGER /* Average reading score */,
  "sciencetot" INTEGER /* Average science score */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "low_income" (
  "low_income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each low-income entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "low_income_percent" REAL /* Percentage of low-income students */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students for low-income data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of low-income data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("low_income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_low_income_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., demographics, performance) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, educator, policymaker) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the district */,
  "total_schools" INTEGER /* Total number of schools in the district */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the district was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_district_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the school joined the district */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the school left the district (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_district_membership_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES school_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_district_membership_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "request_data" TEXT /* Description of the data requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
